---
title: "Average Marginal Effects Benchmark"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("10-participation-model-derive-ame.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 10: AME method choice and timing notes")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The prose above is rendered from the legacy comments, with comment markers removed. The tables below replace manually written timing/status comments with current target outputs; where the current `marginaleffects` call is incompatible with the active package version, the incompatibility is shown explicitly rather than rewritten as a successful timing result.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r methods, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
ame_methods <- read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "ame", "ame_methods_benchmark.csv")
ame_table_cols <- intersect(c("method", "sample_size", "elapsed_seconds", "status"), names(ame_methods))
analysis_table(ame_methods[ame_table_cols], "Current AME benchmark attempts")
```

```{r method-reasons, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (all(c("method", "sample_size", "reason") %in% names(ame_methods))) {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(ame_methods))) {
    reason <- ame_methods$reason[[i]]
    fallback <- if ("fallback" %in% names(ame_methods)) ame_methods$fallback[[i]] else ""
    if (nzchar(reason) || nzchar(fallback)) {
      cat("### Current-version benchmark note: `", ame_methods$method[[i]], "`, n = ", ame_methods$sample_size[[i]], "\n\n", sep = "")
      if (nzchar(reason)) cat("```text\n", reason, "\n```\n\n", sep = "")
      if (nzchar(fallback)) cat("```text\n", fallback, "\n```\n\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
}
```

```{r notes, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "ame", "ame_legacy_benchmark_notes.csv"), "Legacy AME benchmark notes")
```

```{r parallel, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "ame", "ame_parallelization_notes.csv"), "Parallelization notes")
```
